form.formComment: Comes here off a 36-day let-up. At the latest run favourite; won by 2.5 len at Lyon-la-Soie March 11 over 2150m defeating Sede Vacante carrying 58kg at $2.40. The run before that 7th of 9 at Cagnes-sur-Mer All Weather on February 21 over 2000m, 6 len behind Hatanka Fal with 55.5kg at $6.10. Leading contender.

form.formComment: Raced twice to date. At long odds at debut, ran last of 9 at Toulouse on March 18 over 2100m, slow going 8 len behind Easy As Pie carrying 55.5kg at $37. Last start 5th of 7 at Toulouse on April 6 over 2000m, on a slow track; 12 len behind Duro carrying 58kg at $55. Looks tested again.
